name: Square Sling
description: Square Sling – Game Description Square Sling is a fast-paced platformer game where you control a square using movement and grappling mechanics. Use your skills to swing, jump, and move through the environment with precision. Master your timing, aim, and control to travel further and improve your performance. How far can you go?
instructions: Use WASD or Arrow Keys to move and jump Hold Mouse Click to grapple in the direction of your cursor You can still move in mid-air using normal movement controls without grappling Keep practicing to improve your control and timing
